nodes.text: Address? Eight-oh-nine Maple Run Court. Been there forty-three years. Raised two kids, buried one dog, survived three rounds of the city repaving the street wrong.

responses.text: Forty-three years. That's quite a history.

nodes.text: Long enough to watch the neighborhood change three times. Used to be you could leave your door unlocked. Now I've got a Ring camera. Different world. But it's home.
Same place I've been every Tuesday for fifteen years. Not going anywhere.
